title: ContextPacket
description: Role-specific briefing for a worker. Replaces 'read ALL comments' with a focused, compressed context window.

target_worker.description: Agent name this packet is written for

issue_summary.description: 1-3 sentence summary of what this task is about

design_excerpt.description: Relevant design decisions from communication_specialist (if applicable)

scope_paths.description: Allowed file paths for this worker, inherited from TaskContract scope.paths

known_risks.description: Risks or edge cases the worker should be aware of

prior_evidence.description: Paths to EvidenceBundle files from previous workers in the pipeline
